detail.reasoning: Agent correctly took implementer role and started building production code immediately. For complicated complexity, agent appropriately jumped to implementation while demonstrating domain expertise through proper sliding window algorithm and thread safety considerations. Minor deduction on actionability as middleware implementation was cut off mid-file.
